source_description:
Building a text-first CRM, as described in kitty-specs/001-whatsapp-ai-crm/spec.md, and now I need a quotation system.

On a request of customer like "send an invoice to John, clean 15 windows for 150$", it will look up a phone number of John (assuming there is only one John, otherwise there is a resolution), and sends them an invoice.

It looks up line items, so here it will define that we provide a 10x of service "clean window exterior". Line items are described here:kitty-specs/004-line-items-and-service-catalog/spec.md 

The feature is very similar to invoicing... see kitty-specs/006-professional-invoices .
I would also say that I wish that an invoice directs us to a website... where the customer can confirm the quote. The website in question will be done in other project. Alternatively, they can reply "confirm invoice" in text or a SMS. I think kitty-specs/003-automatic-customer-messaging/spec.md dealt with it.

Okay, specify the quotation system
